# Helper functions for normalization and similarity
import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # tanween, tashkeel etc
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'\u0640')
punct_re = re.compile(r'[\W_]+', re.UNICODE)  # remove non-word, including punctuation; but we might keep spaces
# But we should keep spaces; let's create function that strips punctuation but keeps spaces
def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    # unify Arabic hamza forms? We'll standardize alef variants and ya/ta marbuta?
    s = str(s)
    s = s.strip()
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    # normalize alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')  # alif maqsura to ya
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')  # maybe remove hamza
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')  # ta marbuta to ha
    # remove punctuation but keep spaces and Arabic letters/digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    return s.lower().strip()

def lcs(a, b):
    # compute LCS length dynamic programming
    # convert to list of tokens or chars? We'll do char-level after normalization (spaces removed)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # We'll implement optimized LCS using DP, O(n*m) may be heavy but strings small; ok.
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = dp[j] if dp[j] >= dp[j-1] else dp[j-1]
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def char_ratio(a, b):
    # ratio using LCS of character sequences after removing spaces to be robust
    a2 = ''.join(a.split())
    b2 = ''.join(b.split())
    if not a2 or not b2:
        return 0.0
    l = lcs(a2, b2)
    return (2*l) / (len(a2) + len(b2))

def token_f1(a, b):
    # compute token-level precision/recall F1 based on tokens
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    # Use multiset intersection
    from collections import Counter
    ca, cb = Counter(ta), Counter(tb)
    inter = sum((ca & cb).values())
    precision = inter / len(tb)
    recall = inter / len(ta)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

def combined_similarity(a, b):
    # Use average of char_ratio and token_f1
    cr = char_ratio(a, b)
    f1 = token_f1(a, b)
    return (cr + f1) / 2.0, cr, f1

# Prepare normalized texts for hadith and quran
quran_texts = [ (i, rec.get('ayah_text',''), normalize_arabic(rec.get('ayah_text',''))) for i, rec in enumerate(quran_db)]
hadith_texts = [ (i, rec.get('Matn') if rec.get('Matn') else rec.get('hadithTxt',''), normalize_arabic(rec.get('Matn') if rec.get('Matn') else rec.get('hadithTxt',''))) for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_db)]
len(quran_texts), len(hadith_texts)

full_span = "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به"
snippet = "لا يؤمن أح...لما جئت به"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_arabic(snippet)
norm_full, norm_snippet

parts = ["لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون", "هواه تبعًا لما جئت به", "لا يؤمن أحدكم", "حتى يكون هواه تبعا"]
parts_norm = [normalize_arabic(p) for p in parts]
parts_norm

# Find entries that include at least two of the parts normalized
candidates = []
for i,(idx,orig,norm) in enumerate(hadith_texts):
    count = sum(1 for p in parts_norm if p and p in norm)
    if count >= 1:  # try >=1 first
        candidates.append((idx,orig,norm,count))
len(candidates)

# Reload datasets after reset
import json, re, unicodedata
qh_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
sh_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
quran_db = json.load(open(qh_path,'r',encoding='utf-8'))
hadith_db = json.load(open(sh_path,'r',encoding='utf-8'))

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'\u0640')
def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s).strip()
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    return s.lower().strip()

quran_texts = [ (i, rec.get('ayah_text',''), normalize_arabic(rec.get('ayah_text',''))) for i, rec in enumerate(quran_db)]
hadith_texts = [ (i, rec.get('Matn') if rec.get('Matn') else rec.get('hadithTxt',''), normalize_arabic(rec.get('Matn') if rec.get('Matn') else rec.get('hadithTxt',''))) for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_db)]
len(quran_texts), len(hadith_texts)

full_span = "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به"
snippet = "لا يؤمن أح...لما جئت به"
parts = ["لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون", "هواه تبعًا لما جئت به", "لا يؤمن أحدكم", "حتى يكون هواه تبعا"]

norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_arabic(snippet)
parts_norm = [normalize_arabic(p) for p in parts]
norm_full, norm_snippet, parts_norm[:2]

# Scan hadith texts for occurrences of the parts; store matches with count
candidates = []
for idx,(i,orig,norm) in enumerate(hadith_texts):
    count = sum(1 for p in parts_norm if p and (p in norm))
    if count >= 1:
        candidates.append((i, orig, norm, count))
len(candidates)

# Show the candidates (indices and small slice)
[(i, count, orig[:200]) for (i,orig,norm,count) in candidates[:10]]

phrase_norm = normalize_arabic("هواه تبعًا لما جئت به")
# search for this phrase
hits = [(i,orig) for i,orig,norm in hadith_texts if phrase_norm in norm]
len(hits)

hw_hits = [(i,orig[:200]) for i,orig,norm in hadith_texts if normalize_arabic("هواه") in norm][:20]
len(hw_hits), hw_hits[:10]

jb_phrase = normalize_arabic("جئت به")
[j for j in [(i,orig[:200]) for i,orig,norm in hadith_texts if jb_phrase in norm][:10]]

norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
# compute top quranic similarity
def compute_top_similar_entries(target_norm, entries, text_getter=lambda x: x):
    sims = []
    for idx,(i, orig, norm) in enumerate(entries):
        sim, cr, f1 = combined_similarity(target_norm, norm)
        sims.append((sim, cr, f1, i, orig))
    sims.sort(reverse=True)
    return sims[:15]

top_quran = compute_top_similar_entries(norm_full, quran_texts)
[(round(sim,3), round(cr,3), round(f1,3), i, orig) for sim,cr,f1,i,orig in top_quran[:10]]

norm_snippet = normalize_arabic("لا يؤمن أح...لما جئت به")
top_hadith_snip = compute_top_similar(norm_snippet, hadith_texts, topn=10)
[(round(sim,3), i, orig[:100]) for sim,cr,f1,i,orig in top_hadith_snip]

for phrase in ["تبعًا لما جئت به", "تبعا لما جئت به", "هواه تبعا لما جئت", "هواه تبعا", "هواه تبعًا", "لما جئت به"]:
    pn = normalize_arabic(phrase)
    count = sum(1 for _,_,norm in hadith_texts if pn in norm)
    print(phrase, "->", count)

verse = "فَلَا وَرَبِّكَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ حَتَّىٰ يُحَكِّمُوكَ فِيمَا شَجَرَ بَيْنَهُمْ"
norm_verse = normalize_arabic(verse)
comb = combined_similarity(norm_full, norm_verse)
comb
